context: Indian music in 2010 saw Bollywood soundtracks dominate alongside the rise of digital distribution. YouTube was transforming how India consumed music, and caller tune revenue rivaled physical sales. Item numbers like 'Munni Badnaam Hui' and 'Sheila Ki Jawani' became massive cultural phenomena. Rahat Fateh Ali Khan had a banner year with multiple chart-topping romantic ballads.

tracks.title: Sajda
tracks.artist: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Shankar Mahadevan
